description: Triggers when the user wants a full site SEO audit — crawling multiple pages, generating health scores, detecting technical/content/schema issues with prioritized action plan
should_trigger: Do a full SEO audit of my website and give me a health score
Run a complete SEO check on https://example.com
Analyze my entire site for SEO issues — technical, content, and schema
Give me a website health check before my product launch
Crawl my site and find all critical SEO problems I need to fix
Generate a prioritized action plan to improve my site's SEO from 45 to 80
should_not_trigger: Check if my hreflang tags are correct
Fix the schema markup on my product page
Improve the meta description of my about page
